Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Nurita]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 2''' — Nurita is Leah's aunt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 3''' — Nurita is Leah's aunt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 5''' — Nurita is Leah's aunt and a villager in Myria.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Nurita is Leah's aunt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 15''' — Nurita is Leah’s aunt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 16''' — Nurita is a Myrian who has taken charge of the surviving villagers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Nurita is a woman traveling with the Myrians.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Nurita is a Myrian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Nurita is part of the party with Alin and Simon.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Nurita has a niece who is Leah's sister.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 17''' — Nurita is Leah's aunt.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 8''' — Nurita is Leah's aunt.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 13''' — Nurita is Leah's aunt and a resident of Myria.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 14''' — Leah spent two years with her aunt Nurita.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
